body:
## Summary
- Adds the explicit `--focus-countdown-banner-parity` validator path, with `--focus-countdown-banner` kept as a compatibility alias.
- Emits a narrow countdown/study-plan summary: citizenship rule date, first sitting date, deadline date, source URL count, Home mount counters, and `studyPlanRuntime*` counters.
- Extends countdown and routing tests so the focus mode cannot fall back to full content validation.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-countdown-banner-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-countdown-banner`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-countdown-banner-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "countdown|focus-countdown|studyPlanRuntime|routing"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`
title: Countdown: add focused study-plan validator routing
